def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Multi-indicator mean reversion strategy for NVDA.
    Combines momentum, volatility, and trend filters.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Ensure required columns exist
    required_cols = ["RSI", "MACD_Hist", "BB_Pct", "ROC", "MA20", "MA50", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # RSI oversold condition (mean reversion)
    rsi_oversold = df["RSI"] < 35
    
    # MACD histogram positive (momentum building)
    macd_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    
    # Price near lower Bollinger Band (mean reversion setup)
    bb_low = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.3
    
    # Positive ROC (price acceleration)
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Uptrend filter: MA20 above MA50
    uptrend = df["MA20"] > df["MA50"]
    
    # Volume confirmation (above average)
    vol_avg = df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    vol_confirm = df["Volume"] > vol_avg * 0.9
    
    # Long signal: oversold + momentum + trend
    long_signal = rsi_oversold & macd_positive & bb_low & roc_positive & uptrend & vol_confirm
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Multi-indicator momentum strategy for NVDA.
    Combines trend-following (moving averages), momentum (MACD, ROC),
    and mean reversion (RSI, Bollinger Bands) signals.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Trend condition: Price above key moving averages
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])
    
    # Momentum conditions
    macd_bullish = df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Mean reversion: RSI not overbought, room to run
    rsi_valid = (df["RSI"] > 30) & (df["RSI"] < 75)
    
    # Volume confirmation: above average
    volume_confirm = df["Volume"] > df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    
    # Bollinger Bands: price in lower half suggests upside potential
    bb_position = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.6
    
    # Combined signal: trend + momentum + RSI + volume
    long_signal = trend_up & macd_bullish & roc_positive & rsi_valid & volume_confirm & bb_position
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Multi-indicator momentum strategy for NVDA.
    Goes long when multiple momentum indicators align bullishly.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Ensure required columns exist
    required_cols = ["RSI", "MACD_Hist", "Stoch_K", "Stoch_D", "ROC", "BB_Pct", "MA5", "MA20"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # RSI oversold bounce (RSI < 40) with recovery potential
    rsi_bullish = df["RSI"] < 40
    
    # MACD histogram positive and increasing (momentum)
    macd_bullish = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    macd_increasing = df["MACD_Hist"] > df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1)
    
    # Stochastic not overbought, K above D (bullish crossover tendency)
    stoch_bullish = (df["Stoch_K"] < 80) & (df["Stoch_K"] > df["Stoch_D"])
    
    # Rate of Change positive (upward momentum)
    roc_bullish = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Price near lower Bollinger Band (mean reversion opportunity)
    bb_bullish = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.3
    
    # Price above MA5 and MA20 (trend confirmation)
    trend_bullish = (df["Close"] > df["MA5"]) & (df["MA5"] > df["MA20"])
    
    # Combine conditions: require RSI + MACD + Stoch + ROC + Trend
    signal = (
        rsi_bullish & 
        macd_bullish & 
        macd_increasing &
        stoch_bullish & 
        roc_bullish & 
        trend_bullish
    ).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Multi-indicator momentum strategy for NVDA.
    Long when: RSI oversold, MACD positive, price above MA20, and volume confirmation.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Ensure required columns exist
    required_cols = ["RSI", "MACD_Hist", "MA20", "Close", "Volume", "EMA12", "EMA26", "BB_Pct"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Condition 1: RSI oversold but recovering (momentum reversal)
    rsi_oversold = df["RSI"] < 40
    rsi_recovering = df["RSI"] > df["RSI"].shift(1)
    
    # Condition 2: MACD histogram positive and increasing
    macd_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    macd_increasing = df["MACD_Hist"] > df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1)
    
    # Condition 3: Price above 20-period MA (uptrend)
    price_above_ma20 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    
    # Condition 4: Volume above average (confirmation)
    volume_sma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_surge = df["Volume"] > volume_sma * 1.1
    
    # Condition 5: Bollinger Band position (not overbought)
    bb_not_extreme = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.9
    
    # Combine all conditions
    long_condition = (
        rsi_oversold & 
        rsi_recovering & 
        macd_positive & 
        macd_increasing & 
        price_above_ma20 & 
        volume_surge & 
        bb_not_extreme
    )
    
    signal = long_condition.astype(int)
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved multi-indicator strategy combining momentum, mean reversion, and volatility filters.
    Reduces false signals by requiring stronger confluence and volatility confirmation.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["RSI", "MACD", "MACD_Signal", "MACD_Hist", "BB_Pct", "ROC", 
                     "MA20", "MA50", "Volume", "Close", "BB_Width"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Trend filter: Price above key moving averages (from s1)
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])
    
    # Momentum conditions: MACD bullish crossover
    macd_bullish = df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]
    macd_hist_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    
    # ROC positive for acceleration
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # RSI mean reversion: oversold to moderate (30-65 range for better entries)
    rsi_valid = (df["RSI"] > 25) & (df["RSI"] < 65)
    
    # Bollinger Bands: price in lower half (mean reversion setup)
    bb_low = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.4
    
    # Volume confirmation: above 20-period average
    vol_avg = df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    vol_confirm = df["Volume"] > vol_avg * 0.85
    
    # Volatility filter: BB_Width in favorable range (not too tight, not too wide)
    # Avoid trading when volatility is extremely compressed or expanded
    bb_width_avg = df["BB_Width"].rolling(20).mean()
    bb_width_valid = (df["BB_Width"] > bb_width_avg * 0.6) & (df["BB_Width"] < bb_width_avg * 2.0)
    
    # Stronger confluence: require trend + momentum + RSI + volume + volatility
    # This reduces false signals compared to original strategies
    long_signal = (trend_up & macd_bullish & macd_hist_positive & 
                   roc_positive & rsi_valid & bb_low & 
                   vol_confirm & bb_width_valid)
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    return signal

        return signal
    
    # Trend filter: price and MA alignment
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])

    rsi_setup = (df["RSI"] > 25) & (df["RSI"] < 65)

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved multi-indicator strategy combining best ideas from previous generation.
    Adds volatility filter and refined entry conditions for better risk-adjusted returns.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MA50", "RSI", "MACD", "MACD_Signal", 
                     "MACD_Hist", "ROC", "BB_Pct", "Volume", "High", "Low"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Volatility filter: trade when volatility is moderate (not too extreme)
    # Calculate ATR proxy: (High - Low) / Close
    atr_pct = (df["High"] - df["Low"]) / df["Close"]
    atr_pct_ma = atr_pct.rolling(14).mean()
    volatility_favorable = (atr_pct > atr_pct_ma * 0.7) & (atr_pct < atr_pct_ma * 1.5)
    
    # Trend filter: Price above both key moving averages
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])
    
    # Momentum filters (from best strategies)
    macd_bullish = df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]
    macd_hist_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Mean reversion: RSI in sweet spot (not overbought, has room to run)
    rsi_valid = (df["RSI"] > 30) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Bollinger Bands: price in lower-middle range suggests upside
    bb_position = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.5
    
    # Volume confirmation: above 20-period average
    vol_avg = df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    volume_confirm = df["Volume"] > vol_avg * 0.85
    
    # Combined signal: all major conditions must align
    # Require trend + momentum convergence + RSI confirmation + volatility
    long_signal = (trend_up & macd_bullish & macd_hist_positive & 
                   roc_positive & rsi_valid & bb_position & 
                   volume_confirm & volatility_favorable)
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved multi-indicator strategy combining momentum, mean reversion, and volatility filters.
    Focuses on high-probability entries by requiring trend confirmation and volatility conditions.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MA50", "RSI", "MACD", "MACD_Signal", "MACD_Hist", 
                     "ROC", "BB_Pct", "Volume", "BB_Width", "Stoch_K", "Stoch_D"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Trend filter: Price above key moving averages (uptrend)
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])
    
    # Momentum conditions
    macd_bullish = df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]
    macd_hist_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Mean reversion: RSI in sweet spot (not overbought, not oversold)
    rsi_valid = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Stochastic confirmation: K above D and not overbought
    stoch_bullish = (df["Stoch_K"] > df["Stoch_D"]) & (df["Stoch_K"] < 80)
    
    # Volume confirmation: above 20-period average
    vol_avg = df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    volume_confirm = df["Volume"] > vol_avg * 0.85
    
    # Bollinger Bands: price in lower half (mean reversion potential)
    bb_position = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.5
    
    # Volatility filter: BB_Width in reasonable range (not too tight, not too wide)
    bb_width_avg = df["BB_Width"].rolling(20).mean()
    bb_width_std = df["BB_Width"].rolling(20).std()
    vol_filter = (df["BB_Width"] > bb_width_avg * 0.7) & (df["BB_Width"] < bb_width_avg * 1.5)
    
    # Combined signal: all conditions must align
    long_signal = (trend_up & macd_bullish & macd_hist_positive & roc_positive & 
                   rsi_valid & stoch_bullish & volume_confirm & bb_position & vol_filter)
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved multi-indicator strategy combining best ideas from top performers.
    Adds volume confirmation filter and refined entry conditions.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["RSI", "MACD", "MACD_Signal", "MACD_Hist", "BB_Pct", "ROC", 
                     "MA20", "MA50", "Volume", "Close", "Stoch_K", "Stoch_D"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Volume confirmation - require elevated volume for entries
    vol_avg = df["Volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    vol_ratio = df["Volume"] / vol_avg
    vol_confirm = vol_ratio > 1.2
    
    # Trend filter: Price above MA20, MA20 above MA50 (uptrend)
    trend_up = (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MA20"] > df["MA50"])
    
    # Momentum conditions
    macd_bullish = df["MACD"] > df["MACD_Signal"]
    macd_hist_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    roc_positive = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Mean reversion: RSI oversold but not too extreme
    rsi_oversold = (df["RSI"] < 40) & (df["RSI"] > 20)
    
    # Stochastic confirmation: K below D suggests reversal opportunity
    stoch_setup = df["Stoch_K"] < df["Stoch_D"]
    
    # Bollinger Bands: price in lower half (mean reversion setup)
    bb_low = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.4
    
    # Combined signal: trend + momentum + mean reversion + volume
    # Primary: trend + MACD bullish + volume
    primary_signal = trend_up & macd_bullish & vol_confirm
    
    # Secondary: mean reversion setup with volume confirmation
    secondary_signal = rsi_oversold & bb_low & stoch_setup & vol_confirm & roc_positive
    
    # Final signal: either primary or secondary conditions met
    long_signal = primary_signal | secondary_signal
    
    signal = long_signal.astype(int)
    return signal
